title: I dont remember who recommended this hotel to me. But this hotel is called the s...
description: I dont remember who recommended this hotel to me. But this hotel is called the skyview hotel in bangkok. The best most convenient hotel and the most value for money. You have about 6 different malls with completely different themes all connected to the hotel. I found the best sea food place in the entire thailand and im not even exaggerating it. I have tried 100s of places and ended up finding this chep small stall that serves the best sea food under 5 mins. We love walking a lot , and almost everyday walk 10/15k steps and grab fresh juice. Never felt tired. The pathways are always festive with music and mascots, something is always happening here and makes you feel so happy to see people happy around you. The kids get super excited seeing the dragons , horses and what not. If you have kids, youve got all sorts of escape rooms, climbing and other play grounds all under walking distance. And you literally walk through air conditioned malls btw. Even during the rain you simple walk using the interconnected sheltered path ways and listen to the birds chipping. You have got 4 cinema halls including imax. All under walking distance. You can find all e bike rides waiting on the foot path. The in hotel food is amazing too. But ever since i found the sea food place ive stopped going to any other seafood places. So shopping, walking, cycling, movies, food, play areas all are just around the corner. And ive not found any other hotels so far that has eeeverything attached to it. I didnt tag any hotel or the food shop here so that you know its not a paid campaign or anything. i genuinely recommend everyone to stay here and explore the entire neighbourhood.
